testcase.name: contacts/actions.ts > getProfileContactsForOwner > returns cached contacts for authenticated owner
contacts/actions.ts > getProfileContactsForOwner > throws Unauthorized when not authenticated
contacts/actions.ts > getProfileContactsForOwner > passes correct cache key and tags to unstable_cache
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — create new contact > inserts a new contact when no id is provided
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — create new contact > calls sanitizeContactInput before saving
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — create new contact > invalidates caches after successful save
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — update existing contact > updates an existing contact when id is provided
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — update existing contact > throws when updating a non-existent contact
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — plan limit enforcement > throws ContactLimitError when contact limit is reached
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — plan limit enforcement > allows insert when under the contact limit
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — plan limit enforcement > allows insert when entitlements are unavailable (billing down)
contacts/actions.ts > saveContact — plan limit enforcement > allows insert when contactsLimit is null (pro/unlimited plan)
contacts/actions.ts > deleteContact > deletes an owned contact
contacts/actions.ts > deleteContact > throws when contact does not exist
contacts/actions.ts > deleteContact > throws Unauthorized when not authenticated
contacts/actions.ts > deleteContact > invalidates caches after successful delete
contacts/actions.ts > auth rejection for all actions > saveContact rejects unauthenticated users
contacts/actions.ts > profile ownership verification > saveContact throws when profile is not owned by the user
contacts/actions.ts > profile ownership verification > deleteContact throws when profile is not owned by the user
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > loadReleaseMatrix > returns mapped releases for authenticated user
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > loadReleaseMatrix > redirects to sign-in when not authenticated
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > loadReleaseMatrix > redirects to onboarding when profile needs onboarding
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > loadReleaseMatrix > filters provider links to only those with URLs
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > syncFromSpotify > syncs releases and triggers discovery on success
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > syncFromSpotify > returns error when no Spotify ID on profile
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > syncFromSpotify > rejects unauthenticated calls
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > syncFromSpotify > returns failure details on sync error
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > checkSpotifyConnection > returns connected when profile has Spotify ID
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > checkSpotifyConnection > returns not connected when no user
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > checkSpotifyConnection > returns not connected when needs onboarding
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > connectSpotifyArtist > connects Spotify artist and syncs releases
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > connectSpotifyArtist > rejects unauthenticated calls
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > connectSpotifyArtist > returns failure when sync fails
@critical releases/actions.ts — create/sync operations > connectSpotifyArtist > handles unique constraint race conflicts gracefully
tour-dates/actions.ts > loadTourDates > returns tour dates for authenticated user
tour-dates/actions.ts > loadTourDates > redirects unauthenticated users to sign-in
tour-dates/actions.ts > loadUpcomingTourDates > returns only upcoming dates for a given profile
tour-dates/actions.ts > loadUpcomingTourDates > does not require authentication
tour-dates/actions.ts > checkBandsintownConnection > returns connected status when artist is configured
tour-dates/actions.ts > checkBandsintownConnection > returns disconnected for unauthenticated user
tour-dates/actions.ts > saveBandsintownApiKey > encrypts and stores the API key
tour-dates/actions.ts > saveBandsintownApiKey > rejects keys shorter than 10 characters
tour-dates/actions.ts > saveBandsintownApiKey > throws Unauthorized when not authenticated
tour-dates/actions.ts > removeBandsintownApiKey > clears both API key and artist name from the profile
tour-dates/actions.ts > removeBandsintownApiKey > throws Unauthorized when not authenticated
tour-dates/actions.ts > connectBandsintownArtist > verifies artist, syncs events, and returns tour dates
tour-dates/actions.ts > connectBandsintownArtist > returns failure when artist is not found on Bandsintown
tour-dates/actions.ts > syncFromBandsintown > syncs events when rate limit allows
tour-dates/actions.ts > syncFromBandsintown > rejects sync when rate limited
tour-dates/actions.ts > syncFromBandsintown > returns failure when no artist is connected
tour-dates/actions.ts > createTourDate > creates a manual tour date and invalidates cache
tour-dates/actions.ts > createTourDate > rejects invalid start date
tour-dates/actions.ts > createTourDate > rejects invalid ticket URL
tour-dates/actions.ts > updateTourDate > updates an existing tour date with ownership check
tour-dates/actions.ts > updateTourDate > throws when tour date is not found (ownership check fails)
tour-dates/actions.ts > updateTourDate > validates ticket URL on update
tour-dates/actions.ts > deleteTourDate > deletes a tour date owned by the user
tour-dates/actions.ts > deleteTourDate > throws when tour date is not found (ownership check)
tour-dates/actions.ts > deleteTourDate > throws Unauthorized when not authenticated
tour-dates/actions.ts > disconnectBandsintown > clears artist name and removes synced events
tour-dates/actions.ts > disconnectBandsintown > returns failure and captures error on database failure
tour-dates/actions.ts > disconnectBandsintown > throws Unauthorized when not authenticated
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > saveBandsintownApiKey throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > removeBandsintownApiKey throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > connectBandsintownArtist throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > syncFromBandsintown throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > createTourDate throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > updateTourDate throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > deleteTourDate throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > auth rejection for protected actions > disconnectBandsintown throws Unauthorized for unauthenticated users
tour-dates/actions.ts > cache invalidation on mutations > revalidates tag and path after createTourDate
tour-dates/actions.ts > cache invalidation on mutations > revalidates tag after deleteTourDate (path skipped to preserve sidebar)
